title: Rankify
description: This plugin adds a ranks that are fully customizable
body:
Rankify is a lightweight yet powerful rank management plugin for Minecraft servers. It gives simplicity to rank management for server administrators without the headache involved in its customization. With Rankify, you will be able to assign and change player ranks in no time according to your server requirements, while keeping rank management simple and stress-free.

### Ranks
- Guest (default)
- Member
- Moderator
- Admin
- Youtube
- Co-Owner
- Owner


<details>
<summary>Commands</summary>


```
/rankify gui
/rankify <player_name> <rank>
```


</details>

<details>
<summary>Other Information</summary>

to report bugs, use github \
to suggest features, go to discord server

</details>


<details>
<summary>Permissions</summary>

  rankify.setrank:


  
    - description: Allows a player to set ranks.

    - default: op

    
  rankify.reload:


  
    - description: Allows a player to reload the plugin config.
    
    - default: op

  rankify.gui:

  
    - description: Allows a player to open Rankify GUI.
    
    - default: op

  Owner, CoOwner, Admin, and Moderator are the only ranks with these permissions by defualt

</details>


### Requierments 
[Simple Gui Api](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-gui-api)
